work.title: Software Engineer Intern
highlights: Led end-to-end onboarding of Application Gateway to the HOBO v2 model for managed identity (MSI) certificate renewal, implementing changes across NRP, GWM, and App Gateway services to improve security and operational reliability.
Eliminated storage of customer credentials by transitioning to IMDS-based token management, reducing risk of secret exposure and aligning with SFI compliance requirements.

work.title: Software Fellowship
highlights: Developed a project that integrated Palantir OSDK for semantic search & optimization, dynamically selecting the best stores.
Designed and deployed a microservices-based grocery ordering platform using .NET 8 (C#), Python (FastAPI), and React.

work.title: Software Engineer Intern
highlights: Optimized microservice communication efficiency by 20% using gRPC and C# with Docker, orchestrated by Kubernetes.
Led migration of web application from Django/Vue.js to C# .NET Blazor, improving scalability and maintainability.

work.title: Software Engineer Intern
highlights: Developed image enhancement modules using OpenCV and PyTorch, reducing processing times by 32% for image processing.
Integrated AI models using ONNX and TensorRT, decreasing inference times by 23%.

education.institution: Washington University in St. Louis, MO

projects.name: Cache-Aware Scheduler Fairness Benchmarking for I-Cilk
projects.description: Modified Memcached benchmark in C to simulate cache-miss penalty, instrumented OOM tracking to expose LRU thread starvation. Built Python analysis pipeline (pandas, matplotlib) to evaluate scheduler fairness across a 2x2 experimental matrix.

projects.name: Real-Time Crypto Arbitrage Engine
projects.description: Engineered a fault-tolerant streaming pipeline using Kafka and Flink, processing 100+ million daily market events with sub-second latency to synchronize and detect cross-exchange crypto arbitrage using AWS S3 and Snowflake.

projects.name: Flash Attention Using CUDA
projects.description: Engineered an optimized Flash Attention kernel in C++ and CUDA, translating scaled dot-product attention from a mathematical CPU reference down to bare-metal parallel execution on an NVIDIA RTX 4000 Ada. Eliminated VRAM bottlenecks by implementing kernel fusion, shared memory tiling, and a custom online softmax algorithm.

projects.name: Jobbie Application Development
projects.description: Designed and implemented 5 microservices using C#, Golang, and Node.js, with communication facilitated through gRPC, HTTP, and Kafka. Containerized individual services using Docker and deployed with Kubernetes on Azure Kubernetes Service. Maintained CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps to streamline development and deployment processes.
